hero.description: We develop specialized software for clinics and medical offices. Automate appointments, medical records, and billing with cutting-edge technology.

product.label: Star Product
product.title: TurnosMedicos
product.description: The most complete platform for medical appointment management. Designed by healthcare professionals, for healthcare professionals.
product.feature1_text: Visual calendar with multi-professional and specialty management.
product.feature2_text: WhatsApp, SMS, and email to reduce no-shows by up to 60%.
product.feature3_text: Patients book online 24/7 without needing to call.

services.label: Services
services.title: Comprehensive Solutions
services.subtitle: Everything you need to digitize your practice and improve your patients' experience.
services.service1_description: Access your patients' data from any device, securely and organized.
services.service2_description: Generate invoices and receipts automatically, integrated with tax authorities.
services.service3_description: Conduct virtual consultations with HD video, chat, and document sharing.
services.service4_description: Issue valid electronic prescriptions with certified digital signature.
services.service5_description: Connect with laboratories, pharmacies, and insurance systems.
services.service6_description: Dedicated team available 24/7 to resolve any inquiry.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Transparent Plans
pricing.subtitle: No surprises or hidden costs. Choose the plan that best fits your practice.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Technology with Purpose
about.description: Since 2018, we've been dedicated to simplifying medical management in Argentina. Our team combines healthcare and technology expertise to create solutions that truly work.
about.value1_description: Over 5 years developing software for the healthcare sector.
about.value2_description: Doctors, engineers, and designers working together.
about.value3_description: Constant updates based on real feedback.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.subtitle: We're ready to help you transform your practice. Contact us and we'll respond within 24 hours.
contact.form_message_placeholder: Tell us about your practice and needs...

footer.description: Digital solutions for modern medical management. We simplify your day-to-day so you can focus on what matters: your patients.
